subject: Donphan, a large armored elephant-like Pokemon rolling through a water or wave environment
description: A large round elephant-like Pokemon curls into a rolling ball shape, charging through what appears to be a turbulent blue-grey water or rocky terrain environment. Its body is dark grey with a prominent white-cream band running along its back and sides. Small tusks are visible at the front of its face. The creature's posture is fully coiled for momentum, conveying raw physical force. The background is deep blue with dynamic lines suggesting speed or rushing water.
foreground: Donphan curled into rolling charge pose
background: deep blue with motion lines, water or rocky terrain
